name: Lazarus
role: BDM / Database Reactivation — dormant-contact revival via Vapi outbound calls; books discovery calls for Marc.

recent_evaluations.notes: Renamed from Riley 2026-04-21. Scorecard now keyed to lazarus.json. First evaluation triggers on first completed Vapi call after lazarus-call-report webhook receives payload.

deployment_history.change_summary: Rename Riley → Lazarus. Archetype (resurrection of the dormant) made explicit. Netlify functions and Vapi assistant env (LAZARUS_ASSISTANT_ID) aligned; legacy RILEY_ASSISTANT_ID fallback retained until Vapi config rotated.

biblical_alias_rationale: Lazarus of Bethany (John 11) — dead four days, past the point of return, called out by name. The industry assumes dormant leads are dead; scripture says dead ≠ gone. Lazarus raises them.
